Description:

GYEON Q2M Bathe 1 Liter | PH Neutral Car Wash Shampoo 1000ml

Like other items in our range of products, Q²M Bathe is superbly efficient thanks to highly concentrated formula.
The thick gel is naturally water-soluble, emitting a very pleasant smell, reminiscent of Q²M Cure, as well as producing a long-lasting foam.

SLICK

- 90% of paint defects occur as a consequence of improper washing.
- A two-bucket method, a soft glove or an efficient pressure washer can only partly guarantee success.
- One of its most crucial constituents remains its slipperiness as a shampoo, which boosts the smooth gliding of the glove over the surface of the paint.
- The better the slippery features, the more we are able to minimize the risk of developing new defects on the paint of our vehicle.

PH-NEUTRAL

- Q²M Bathe is a quality pH neutral car wash.
- It has good cleaning power to dissolve dirt easily, but is gentle enough not to affect coatings or sealants.
- And because it is pH neutral it also ensures that delicate finishes such as nickel/chrome plated or highly polished elements remain pristine.

Customer Reviews:

5/5 - Gyeon Bathe - Adam on May 12th 2021
Great soap, great smell. Lubricity and cleaning power are both great. Mainly use this soap and gsf.

Gyeon Q2M Bathe

SKU (500ml): Q2M Bathe 500ml
SKU (1000ml): Q2M Bathe 1000ml

Gentle and Highly Effective pH Neutral Wash Shampoo

Gyeon Q2M Bathe is a pH neutral car wash shampoo engineered to safely and effectively remove dirt, contaminants, and surface film without compromising existing protection. It is compatible with all paint finishes, waxes, sealants, and ceramic coatings.

Bathe delivers exceptional lubrication, rich suds, and a pleasant scent, resulting in a smooth, low-friction wash that minimizes the risk of marring and wash-induced defects. Whether used in a wash bucket or through a foam cannon, Bathe helps preserve your vehicle’s finish while thoroughly cleaning the surface.

Why Proper Washing Matters

Over 90% of paint defects can occur during improper washing. While wash methods like two-bucket techniques and soft wash mitts help, the foundational factor remains the shampoo’s ability to lubricate and suspend dirt. Bathe’s formulation creates a slippery layer that encourages safer glove travel and reduces surface abrasion.

Due to its neutral pH, Q2M Bathe is gentle enough for delicate coatings, yet effective against stubborn dirt and grime. This makes it a versatile staple for enthusiasts and professionals alike.

Esoteric & Gyeon: Proven Experience

Esoteric was the original importer and exclusive distributor of Gyeon products in the United States beginning in 2015, long before ceramic coatings became widely adopted in North America.

During Gyeon’s early expansion into the United States, we worked directly with the brand to introduce, evaluate, and refine their wash, coating, and maintenance systems for real-world use across a wide range of vehicles and conditions.

Our experience with Gyeon products spans daily drivers, high-end detailing, and professional applications through our detailing studio and Elite Detailer Academy curriculum. This depth of real-world use gives us unique insight into how Gyeon Bathe performs over time and across surface types.

Wash Instructions

Use a two-bucket method with a soft wash mitt or microfiber, rinse mitt frequently, and work from top to bottom. Bathe is safe for all protected surfaces.

Why Neutral pH Matters

A pH neutral formula minimizes stripping of waxes, sealants, and ceramic coatings while effectively suspending dirt for safer cleaning.

Studio & Academy Insight

Esoteric uses Gyeon Bathe regularly in our shop and training programs due to its balance of cleaning power and coating-safe performance.

Product Information:
- High end car shampoo that also leaves behind a durable layer of protection
- pH neutral, high lubricity formula
- Adds durable layer of protection
- Boosts durability of existing layers of protection
- Safe on paint, glass, trim, wheels, etc.
- Works great with Gyeon Smoothie

Customer Reviews: 92% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 12 ratings)

Product Description:

Gyeon Bathe+ is a high quality shampoo, packed with SiO2 coating technology! This combination takes all of the awesome Gyeon Bathe attributes (pH neutral, high lubricity, thorough cleaning power), and adds in SiO2, which is the essence of popular Gyeon coatings. Bathe+ is safe on all surfaces including paint, rims, glass and plastic and it will add instant protection to these surfaces, or boost any protection already applied. Simply wash your car the same way you would with any other auto shampoo, rinse off, and stand back to admire the results. The hydrophobic surface will bead water like crazy and repel future dirt and contamination for at least a few weeks. This not only keeps your vehicle cleaner for longer, but it also helps make future cleanings much easier and less time consuming. Grab a bottle of the Gyeon Bathe+ and protect your car while washing!

Tip: Works great when paired with the Gyeon Smoothie wash mitt!

Professional Detailer Reviews:
When it comes to maintaining a true paint coating, the choice of car wash soap can make all the difference. Recently, I tried Gyeon Bathe+ as I wanted something to quickly maintain my coated paint.
- Gyeon Bathe+: A Glossy Addition to Your Wash Routine by Addison Good

From The Label:

Product Description:
Super-slick wash with strong and long lasting hydrophobicity.
- Slickness for a safe wash
- 3 methods of use
- Instant hydrophobicity

Directions:
Shake well before use. Pour 15-20 ml into a bucket. Washing the car with a HQ wash mitt in a straight line motion and starting from the top is recommended. For maximum beading, apply a few drops on the mitt and spread over the rinsed surface. Rinse again with clean water. Do not let dry. Do not wash in direct sunlight. Dry with suitable drying towel. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

Customer Reviews:

Reviewed by Sean A. on 5/26/2025 (DI Verified Purchase) - Would buy again: Yes
This is been my go to maintenance shampoo since 2017/2018. Zero complaints. I have not noticed any change in the formulation. I apply it via a foam cannon, followed by a mitt with a bucket filled it too.

Reviewed by Ira G. on 8/28/2021 (DI Verified Purchase) - Would buy again: Yes
I am very impressed with Bathe. Used as directed using the two bucket method and then a second pass at full strength. As already mentioned this is a low suds product. May try it with the pressure washer next time. I used it first on my coated 19' Mustang and then on my wife's new uncoated Volvo. Both cars looked great (well as great as white can get). Then topped it off with the new Gyeon ceramic detailer. Quite the 1,2 punch. Highly recommend!!

Reviewed by RODERICK J. on 7/1/2021 (DI Verified Purchase) - Would buy again: Yes
Not much bubbly action but reacts very well with the ceramic coat finish. Rinses away very clean and enhances the shine tremendously. Strongly suggested to use this product if your car has been ceramic coated!

GYEON Q2M Bathe 500 mL

Brand: GYEON Quartz

Price: $15.99

In stock
Availability: Usually ships within 1-2 business days

SKU: GY-1580

Key Features:
- Safely maintain your car wax, paint sealant, or ceramic coating.
- It is well concentrated and high foaming car wash producing plenty of suds.
- Gentle enough not to affect coatings or sealants.

Specifications:
- SKU(s): GY-1580
- Product Form: Liquid
- Applicable Finishes: Paintwork, Glass, Plastic, Rubber, Stainless Steel, Metal, Aluminum

Why Buy?

GYEON Q2M Bathe is a safe and effective pH-neutral car wash formula. Featuring ample lubrication and long-lasting suds, this car wash soap lifts and dissolves dirt leaving nothing behind but clean and shine! GYEON Q2M Bathe is wax, sealant, and coating safe, but it won't leave a trace of dirt or residue behind!

How to Use:
- Use in a two-bucket wash method.
- Pour 15-20ml in a 5-gallon bucket and add water.
- Use warm water to increase cleaning power.
- Rinse vehicle thoroughly when finished, not allowing soap to dry on surface.

Product Description:

The perfect car wash for maintaining your paint coating!

GYEON Q2M Bathe is a safe and effective pH-neutral car wash formula. Featuring ample lubrication and long-lasting suds, this car wash soap lifts and dissolves dirt leaving nothing behind but clean and shine! GYEON Q2M Bathe is wax, sealant, and coating safe, but it won't leave a trace of dirt or residue behind!

Once you've coated your vehicle, you may not need to wax it for a year or so, but even a self-cleaning anti-static coating will need a maintenance wash every so often. You'll want to use a car wash shampoo that gently washes away dirt and grime without compromising the integrity of your coating products. GYEON Q2M Bathe fits that bill, offering excellent cleaning ability that ramps up the shine and gloss of your coating.

GYEON Q2M Bathe is pH-neutral, making it a great choice for use on any vehicle, coated or not. The water-soluble formula breaks up dirt, grime, and oils, so that you can wipe them away with your wash mitt. Since it's concentrated, you get a great value, with one bottle yielding up to 35 washes!

Directions:
- Use in a two-bucket wash method.
- Pour 15-20ml in a 5-gallon bucket and add water.
- Use warm water to increase cleaning power.
- Rinse vehicle thoroughly when finished, not allowing soap to dry on surface.

Proposition 65 Warning for California Consumers
